products.title: Product Information
products.description: Configure product catalog, units of measure, and stock rules.
products.placeholder: Manage product information, stock alerts, pricing policies, and marketplace synchronisation from here.

unitOfMeasure.title: Unit of Measure
unitOfMeasure.description: Manage products by different units of measure such as pieces, packs, cartons.
unitOfMeasure.noUnitsCreated: No units of measure have been created

attributes.title: Attributes
attributes.description: Manage products by specific characteristics such as color, size, material.

productGroup.title: Product Group
productGroup.description: Manage products by type, characteristics, functionality.

brand.title: Brand
brand.description: Manage products by manufacturer brand or product line.

location.title: Location
location.description: Manage products by sales or storage location such as racks, shelves, cabinets.

fixed.title: Fixed cost
fixed.description: Cost is determined by the first import price or manually entered by the user.

average.title: Average cost
average.description: Cost is calculated using the average method based on import transactions and import returns.

placeOrder.title: Place import orders
placeOrder.description: Allow creating and managing import orders from suppliers.

costManagement.title: Manage import costs
costManagement.description: Track various import costs incurred such as service fees, storage fees.

changeTransactionTime.title: Allow changing transaction time
changeTransactionTime.description: To set up for warehouse management and import transactions, please go to

orders.title: Order Management
orders.description: Configure order, sales, and return workflows.
orders.placeholder: Customise order statuses, approval rules, and notifications for your sales operation.

outOfStock.title: Allow ordering when out of stock
outOfStock.tooltip: When out of stock, the system still allows ordering. If this option is unchecked, the order quantity cannot exceed the Stock minus the previously ordered quantity of the product.

preOrdered.title: Allow selling, transferring when goods have been pre-ordered
preOrdered.tooltip: If this option is unchecked, when Selling or Transferring goods, the system will check if the quantity to Sell or Transfer exceeds the Stock minus the pre-ordered quantity of the product, then it will not allow the transaction to be performed.

transfer.title: Allow transferring orders to another branch
transfer.tooltip: Allows updating the processing branch of orders if staff have permission to update orders.

printQuote.title: Allow printing quotes when selling
printQuote.description: Only show Print button on the sales screen after the transaction is completed

confirmation.title: Show confirmation before completing order
confirmation.description: The system will add a final confirmation step before completing the order, helping the cashier double-check and avoid cases where the customer has not paid.

returnTimeLimit.title: Return time limit
returnTimeLimit.description: Allows setting a period within which customers are allowed to return goods after purchase

details.prefix: From purchase date, customers can return goods within

changeTransactionTime.title: Allow changing transaction time
changeTransactionTime.description: Customize changing the time for each transaction type

blockEInvoiceEdit.title: Block editing/canceling issued e-invoices
blockEInvoiceEdit.description: When enabled, the system will not allow editing or canceling issued e-invoices

otherRevenue.title: Other revenue management
otherRevenue.description: Track other revenue types when selling such as service fees, delivery fees

customers.title: Customer Management
customers.description: Configure customer management, debt tracking, and mandatory information fields.
customers.placeholder: Manage membership tiers, reward points, and automated offers for loyal customers.

manageByBranch.title: Customer management by branch
manageByBranch.description: Manage customer list, debt, and points by branch instead of across the entire system.

manageByPersonInCharge.title: Customer management by person in charge
manageByPersonInCharge.description: Set up one or more people in charge of customers, customer groups.

manageAsSupplier.title: Customer management also as supplier
manageAsSupplier.description: Track debt and transactions of partners who are both customers and suppliers.

debtWarning.title: Customer debt warning
debtWarning.description: Display warnings when customer debt exceeds limits or is overdue.

mandatoryFields.title: Set up mandatory information
mandatoryFields.description: Set up mandatory fields for customer information.

loyaltyPoints.title: Loyalty Points
loyaltyPoints.description: Allows customers to earn points when purchasing. Accumulated points can be redeemed to pay for orders.

promotions.title: Promotions
promotions.description: Allows managing and applying promotions by product or order value.

voucher.title: Voucher
voucher.description: Allows managing, issuing, and applying purchase vouchers.

coupon.title: Coupon
coupon.description: Allows managing, issuing, and applying discount codes.
coupon.applyWithOther: Apply simultaneously with other promotion programs

ledger.title: Cash Ledger
ledger.description: Manage bank accounts and e-wallets used for the store's revenue and expenditure transactions.
ledger.placeholder: Connect bank accounts, sync transactions, and monitor cashflow in real time.

tax.title: Tax
tax.description: Configure tax rates, tax codes, and reporting.
tax.placeholder: Set applicable tax rates, calculation rules, and integrate with your accounting system.

vatTax.title: VAT Tax
vatTax.description: Set up tax calculation methods, default tax rates, and applicable transaction types.

setup.title: VAT Tax Setup
setup.applyTaxReduction: Apply tax reduction according to Resolution 204/2025/QH15
setup.defaultCollectTaxOnSale: Default collect tax when selling goods
setup.defaultCollectTaxOnImport: Default collect tax when importing goods

eInvoice.title: E-invoice
eInvoice.description: Enable e-invoices, templates, and digital signatures.
eInvoice.placeholder: Review how to configure e-invoice templates, numbering rules, and issuing permissions.

printing.title: Print templates
printing.description: Configure invoice, delivery note, and label templates.
printing.placeholder: Customise print layouts and connect printers at your points of sale.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.description: Connect shipping partners and track delivery statuses.
delivery.placeholder: Link shipping providers, configure delivery fees, and monitor shipment progress.

payment.title: Payments
payment.description: Connect payment gateways and collection methods.
payment.placeholder: Configure payment methods, reconcile transactions, and integrate digital wallets.

messaging.title: SMS, Email, Zalo
messaging.placeholder: Create messaging scenarios, email marketing campaigns, and sync campaign performance.

storeInfo.title: Store information
storeInfo.description: Edit store, branch, and brand information.
storeInfo.placeholder: Update store addresses, contact details, and customer-facing brand information.

dataHistory.title: Data and operation history
dataHistory.description: Close ledger, Operation history, Delete data.
dataHistory.placeholder: Manage ledger closing, view operation history, and data cleanup.

deleteTrialData.title: Delete trial data
deleteTrialData.description: Allow scheduling deletion of trial data
deleteTrialData.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete all trial data? This action cannot be undone.
deleteTrialData.errorDescription: Unable to delete data. Please try again.

currency.title: Currency management
currency.description: Configure currencies, exchange rates, and rounding rules.
currency.placeholder: Set default currencies, conversion rates, and how currency is displayed on invoices.

users.title: User management
users.description: Assign staff permissions and monitor activity.
users.placeholder: Add staff members, manage access rights, and review activity logs.

dataLock.title: Close ledger
dataLock.description: Set up schedules and permissions for closing data.
dataLock.placeholder: Configure close schedules, authorised users, and reminders before locking the ledger.

activityLog.title: Activity log
activityLog.description: Track staff actions performed in the system.
activityLog.placeholder: Look up activity history, filter by time range, and export operation reports.

dataDeletion.title: Delete data
dataDeletion.description: Control data cleanup and retention policies.
dataDeletion.placeholder: Define who can delete data, retention timelines, and approval steps for safe cleanup.

transaction.title: Transaction History
transaction.deleteConfirmationText: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction? This action cannot be undone.

tooltips.netRevenue: Total sales revenue after deducting discounts and returns. Formula: Total invoice value - Total return value.
tooltips.grossProfit: Gross Profit = Net Revenue - Cost of Goods Sold (COGS). COGS is estimated from product cost price at the time of sale.
tooltips.profitMargin: Profit Margin (%) = (Gross Profit / Net Revenue) × 100. Shows the profitability efficiency of the business.
tooltips.cashBalance: Cash Balance = Total cash received in period - Total cash paid out in period. Only includes cash and transfer transactions.

revenueProfitChart.title: Revenue and Profit
revenueProfitChart.subtitle: Trend over time
revenueProfitChart.tooltip:
Revenue = Total invoice value (after deducting discounts, returns).
Profit = Revenue - Cost of Goods Sold (COGS).
Data is aggregated by time based on the selected period filter.

cashFlowChart.title: Cash Flow (In vs Out)
cashFlowChart.subtitle: Compare cash inflow and outflow
cashFlowChart.tooltip:
Cash In = Total receipts (methods: cash, transfer).
Cash Out = Total payments (methods: cash, transfer).
Data is aggregated by time based on the selected period filter.

tooltips.title: Overview of inventory value, slow-moving inventory and turnover rate.
tooltips.turnoverSpeed: Percentage of products by sales speed: Fast Moving, Slow Moving, Normal.
tooltips.totalValue: Value of goods in stock calculated by cost price.
tooltips.totalValueFormula: = Sum (On-hand Quantity per Product × Cost Price of that Product)
tooltips.slowMoving: Products with no outbound transactions > 90 days.
tooltips.inventoryTurnover: Cost of Goods Sold / Average Inventory Value.
tooltips.totalCostOfGoods: Total value of goods imported from suppliers.

receivablesPayables.title: Receivables & Payables
receivablesPayables.tooltip: Track receivables and payables by payment due status.

topCustomers.title: Top Customers
topCustomers.subtitle: Customers with highest revenue
topCustomers.tooltip:
Top customers sorted by total revenue in the selected period.
Formula: Customer Revenue = Total invoice value of that customer.

topProducts.title: Top High-Profit Products
topProducts.subtitle: Products with highest profit margin
topProducts.tooltip:
Top products sorted by Profit Margin in descending order.
Formula: Profit Margin (%) = (Total Profit / Total Revenue) × 100.
Total Profit = Total Revenue - Total Cost of Goods Sold.

alerts.title: Urgent Attention Required
alerts.tooltip:
Displays important business alerts that need immediate attention.

Alerts include:
• Low profit margin
• High receivables
• Slow-moving inventory
• Low/negative cash balance
• Low stock products
• Unpaid/overdue invoices
• High customer debt
• High return rate

aiRecommendations.title: AI Recommendations
aiRecommendations.tooltip: Recommendations are analyzed based on current business data to help you make better decisions.

recentReturns.title: Customer Returns
recentReturns.tooltip:
Displays recent return orders in the selected period.

Includes:
• Total number of returns
• Total items returned
• Total return amount
• Top returned products

notes.title: Notes:

taxPeriod.title: Item [01] Tax period applied as follows:
taxPeriod.item1: Item [01a] is only declared for Household Businesses (HKD) and Individual Businesses (CNKD) paying tax under the lump-sum method.
taxPeriod.item2: Item [01b] or [01c] is only declared for HKD, CNKD paying tax under the declaration method, or for organizations/individuals declaring tax on behalf, paying tax on behalf, declaring tax monthly or quarterly.
taxPeriod.item3: Item [01d] is declared for HKD, CNKD paying tax per each occurrence.

notes.indicator08a: Item [08a] is only marked when the information in item [08] has changed compared to the immediately preceding declaration.
notes.indicator12a: Item [12a] is only marked when the information in items [12b], [12c], [12d], [12đ] has changed compared to the immediately preceding declaration.
notes.revenueOutput: For the revenue and output items: If it is a lump-sum household business, declare the average estimated revenue and output for 1 month in the year; If it is an individual business paying tax per each occurrence, declare the revenue and output as they arise per each occurrence. If it is an HKD, CNKD paying tax under the declaration method or an organization declaring tax on behalf, paying tax on behalf, then declare the revenue and output monthly or quarterly corresponding to the monthly or quarterly period.
notes.businessCooperation: HKD, CNKD in the form of business cooperation with an organization, the organization shall declare on behalf, accompanied by Declaration 01/CNKD Appendix Detailed list of household businesses, individual businesses according to form 01-1/BK-CNKD, and items from [04] to [18] do not need to be declared.
notes.declarationMethod: Household businesses, individual businesses paying tax under the declaration method, the individual shall declare accompanied by declaration 01/CNKD Appendix list of business activities during the period of the household business, individual business according to form 01-2/BK-HĐKD, except for HKD, CNKD in sectors where revenue can be determined based on confirmation from competent authorities.
notes.partC: Part C only applies to individuals licensed to exploit mineral resources.
